item.title: Testing if Yoyo would survive A Quiet Place 🐈‼️🤫 When I saw all of your hilarious Cat Challenge videos 🫶🏿🤣, I knew I was 100000% doing this with Yoyo!! And happy #InternationalCatDay to all of #CatTok 😻 #quietplacechallenge #AQuietPlace #quietplacecatcha
